jobs.title: Senior AI Automation Engineer
jobs.why: Canva 近期放出的生产级 AI Automation 岗位，深度 LangChain/LangGraph + LLM fine-tuning 技术栈，薪资 A$130K–$240K+；Canva 是澳洲最具影响力的科技独角兽，学员当前不一定够得着，但极佳的方向锚点。

jobs.title: Junior AI Engineer
jobs.why: Macquarie 明确招 Junior AI Engineer（Permanent Full-time），要求 Python/Node.js + AWS + AI/ML 项目经验；Bootcamp 毕业生完成 Phase 3 AI Agent 实战项目后具备基础门槛，AU 顶级投行品牌可直接投。

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 Graduate Australia & New Zealand
jobs.why: Atlassian 2026 Graduate Program 正式 MLE 岗，AU/NZ PR 持有者可申，Masters 优先；毕业生身份申请门槛比正式岗低，Python + NLP + CV 为主要考核方向，T0 品牌 + 全遥工作制。

alternativeCandidates.title: Software Engineer - AI Enablement
alternativeCandidates.note: Mid-level; production-grade backend + AI-native workflow automation at Macquarie; same application portal

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2026 PhD Graduate Australia & New Zealand
alternativeCandidates.note: PhD-specific grad track; same AI Experience team, narrow eligibility (PhD candidates only)

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer, 2025/2026 Intern Australia & New Zealand
alternativeCandidates.note: 12-week intern program; penultimate-year students, same team as grad program

alternativeCandidates.title: 2025/2026 Macquarie Internship Program — Technology and Data (Sydney)
alternativeCandidates.note: Macquarie summer internship; data science / AI stream; for penultimate-year students

alternativeCandidates.title: 2025/2026 Macquarie Internship Program — Technology and Data (Melbourne)
alternativeCandidates.note: Same Macquarie intern program, Melbourne stream; good for VIC-based students

alternativeCandidates.title: Backend Software Engineer - Gen AI Design Generation Experience
alternativeCandidates.note: Mid-level GenAI backend role at Canva; Python/TypeScript + LLM integration focus

alternativeCandidates.title: Graduate & Summer Intern Program — Technology & Cyber
alternativeCandidates.note: CommBank grad program with AI/Data Science stream; rolling applications; AU Big 4 brand

alternativeCandidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer Intern 2026/27
alternativeCandidates.note: ⚠️ Closes 1 May 2026 (tomorrow) — 12-week Canva Launchpad summer internship from Dec 2026; penultimate-year students
